# STRAT.022 ? Mindfulness-Based

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** psychological_frameworks
**Domain:** PSYCHOLOGICAL_FRAMEWORKS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Present moment awareness; non-judgmental observation; acceptance; breathing focus; thoughts as passing events; body awareness

## Application
Cultivate present awareness; observe without judgment; accept what is; use breath as anchor; notice thoughts without attachment; body scanning

## Key Values
- Present awareness
- Non-judgment
- Acceptance
- Observation
- Letting go

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, psychological_frameworks

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
